---
title: "Elizabeth Margaretta Maria Gilbert"
---

## Elizabeth Margaretta Maria Gilbert

**Dates:** (1826-1885)

### Description

campaigner for the blind

### Biography

The blind daughter of a bishop, she had founded the Association for Promoting the General Welfare of the Blind, starting with a school in Holborn in 1854;  see Gordon Goodwin, ‘Gilbert, Elizabeth Margaretta Maria (1826–1885)’, rev. Kenneth R. Whitton, Oxford Dictionary of National Biography, Oxford University Press, 2004.

### Letters

- Letter from June 3d [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
